name: Image Tools
description: Browser-based tools to convert, resize, compress, crop, and edit images.

tools.name: Resize Image
tools.description: Change image dimensions by pixels or percentage.

tools.name: Compress Image
tools.description: Shrink JPG/PNG/WebP file size with quality control.

tools.name: Crop Image
tools.description: Crop images freely or to fixed aspect ratios.

tools.name: Rotate Image
tools.description: Rotate an image by 90 degrees or any angle.

tools.name: Flip Image
tools.description: Mirror an image horizontally or vertically.

tools.name: WebP to PNG
tools.description: Convert WebP images to lossless PNG format.

tools.name: WebP to JPG
tools.description: Convert WebP images to widely supported JPG.

tools.name: PNG to JPG
tools.description: Convert PNG images to compressed JPG files.

tools.name: JPG to PNG
tools.description: Convert JPG images to lossless PNG format.

tools.name: PNG to WebP
tools.description: Convert PNG images to smaller WebP files.

tools.name: JPG to WebP
tools.description: Convert JPG images to modern WebP format.

tools.name: HEIC to JPG
tools.description: Convert iPhone HEIC photos to JPG images.

tools.name: SVG to PNG
tools.description: Rasterize SVG vector files to PNG at any size.

tools.name: PNG to SVG
tools.description: Trace a raster PNG into a scalable SVG vector.

tools.name: Image to Base64
tools.description: Encode an image into a Base64 data URI string.

tools.name: Base64 to Image
tools.description: Decode a Base64 string back into a downloadable image.

tools.name: Favicon Generator
tools.description: Create multi-size favicons and ICO files from an image.

tools.name: Image to ICO
tools.description: Convert PNG/JPG images into Windows ICO icons.

tools.name: Meme Generator
tools.description: Add top and bottom text captions to an image.

tools.name: Add Watermark to Image
tools.description: Overlay text or logo watermarks onto images.

tools.name: Image Color Picker
tools.description: Pick HEX/RGB colors from any pixel of an image.

tools.name: Color Extractor from Image
tools.description: Extract a dominant color palette from a photo.

tools.name: Collage Maker
tools.description: Combine multiple photos into a grid collage.

tools.name: Combine Images
tools.description: Stitch images together horizontally or vertically.

tools.name: Passport Photo Maker
tools.description: Crop and size photos to passport/visa requirements.

tools.name: Grayscale Image
tools.description: Convert a color image to black and white.

tools.name: Blur Image
tools.description: Apply adjustable blur to all or part of an image.

tools.name: Pixelate Image
tools.description: Pixelate or censor regions of an image.

tools.name: Image to PDF
tools.description: Convert images into a single downloadable PDF.

tools.name: Circle Crop Image
tools.description: Crop an image into a transparent circle.
